20 template<typename CoordinatesVariable>

22 {
23 private:
24  typedef EuclidianGeometryT<2,CoordinatesVariable> E2Geometry;

65  IComputeSurface(TemisGeometry2T * geom) : m_geom(geom), m_coords(geom->m_coords) { }
66  virtual ~IComputeSurface() { }

68  TemisGeometry2T * m_geom;
69  const CoordinatesVariable & m_coords;
70  };

72  // Utilise une méthode alternative pour les calculs de centre
73  struct ComputeTriangle3 : public IComputeSurface {
74  ComputeTriangle3(TemisGeometry2T * geom) : IComputeSurface(geom) { }
75  void computeOrientedMeasureAndCenter(const ItemWithNodes & item, Real3 & orientation, Real3 & center, Real3 & mass_center, Array<Real> & coords);
76  };
77

79  ComputeQuad4(TemisGeometry2T * geom) : IComputeSurface(geom) { }
80  void computeOrientedMeasureAndCenter(const ItemWithNodes & item, Real3 & orientation, Real3 & center, Real3 & mass_center, Array<Real> & coords);
81  };
82 
83  struct ComputeInvalidSurface : public IComputeSurface {
84  ComputeInvalidSurface(TemisGeometry2T * geom) : IComputeSurface(geom) { }
85  void computeOrientedMeasureAndCenter(const ItemWithNodes & item, Real3 & orientation, Real3 & center, Real3 & mass_center, Array<Real> & coords);
86  };
87 
88  typedef ComputeInvalidSurface ComputePentagon5;
89  typedef ComputeInvalidSurface ComputeHexagon6;
90 
91  struct IComputeVolume {
92  IComputeVolume(TemisGeometry2T * geom) : m_geom(geom), m_coords(geom->m_coords) { }
93  virtual ~IComputeVolume() { }
94  virtual void computeOrientedMeasureAndCenter(const ItemWithNodes & item, Real & measure, Real3 & center, Array<Real> & coords) = 0;
95  virtual void computeVolumeArea(const ItemWithNodes & item, Real & area) = 0;
96  TemisGeometry2T * m_geom;
97  const CoordinatesVariable & m_coords;
98  };
99 
100  struct ComputeGenericVolume : public IComputeVolume {
101  ComputeGenericVolume(TemisGeometry2T * geom) : IComputeVolume(geom) { }
102  void computeOrientedMeasureAndCenter(const ItemWithNodes & item, Real & measure, Real3 & center, Array<Real> & coords);
103  void computeVolumeArea(const ItemWithNodes & item, Real & area);
104  };
105 
106  struct ComputeInvalidVolume : public IComputeVolume {
107  ComputeInvalidVolume(TemisGeometry2T * geom) : IComputeVolume(geom) { }
108  void computeOrientedMeasureAndCenter(const ItemWithNodes & item, Real & measure, Real3 & center, Array<Real> & coords);
109  void computeVolumeArea(const ItemWithNodes & item, Real & area);
110  };

121  typedef ComputeInvalidVolume ComputeDiTetra5;
122  typedef ComputeInvalidVolume ComputeHeptaedron10;
123  typedef ComputeInvalidVolume ComputeOctaedron12;
124 
126 
128  static inline Real3 computeQuadrilateralCenter(const Real3 & n0, const Real3 & n1, const Real3 & n2, const Real3 & n3)
129  {
130  return 0.25 * (n0 + n1 + n2 + n3);
131  }
133 
134 private:
135  typedef SharedArray< SharedArray<Real> > MapType;
136  MapType m_node_weight;
137 };
